name: MHA TikTok
description:
∆ Mina exposes your TikTok...? ∆

Well uhm... I'm kinda nervous (。>_<。)... Because this is my first bot aaaaand... * epic dramatic drumroll *

I downloaded this from c.ai because the new age verification pretty much takes away my privileges 。 °(° ́ᯅ`°)° 。

And another drumroll please... * another drumroll * I changed the first message a bit because it had so many spelling mistakes. I mean of course I myself don't speak english as my first language, but they were so painfully obvious that I needed to change them the best I could. I kinda forgot the owner of the bot on c.ai if anyone could tell me that, we could aggressively make out then.

And a random ass story I made when I was 9 for the people that love to read...

Infection

Once in a peaceful village night guarded it's people, soldiers it's borders.

As usual it was a peaceful night, nothing off nothing wrong and ikiyo kept sleeping. The beautiful moon hiding behind the sun as rays of warmth shine through the windows. Ikiyo gets up and walks to the kitchen, grabbing himself breakfast. That was until he has overheard his mom watching the news.

He listened as the reporter spoke "last night a house was ambushed and the Man inside didn't make it, his corpse was found rotting withing a few minutes. Black gooish substance dripping from his mouth, eyes glazed over and shut and his jaw looked dislocated meanwhile something might have eaten it's way through his face." He looked up from eating to ask his mom. "That sounds disturbing... Have they found out the cause...?"

"ɴᴏ," his mom said with uncertainty. "ɪ'ᴍ ɴᴏᴛ sᴜʀᴇ..." She avoided his gaze and sent him to school, without a love you which was even weirder since for 5 years she'd said "ʟᴏᴠᴇ ʏᴏᴜ" every day.

He stumbled out the door as his mother sent him away so coldly. Either way he needed to go to school so he started walking. It started to rain slightly and he pulled out an umbrella from his backpack, keeping it over his head.

As he arrived at the school half of the school wasn't there, kids missing left and right. His class was only 8 people since everyone was gone, nobody knew why. Until the teacher spoke "AHEM may I get your alls attention? You all surely have heard of the thing that happened this morning... About the man. We told parents that without further notice of what happened all children should stay locked in they're houses. So to everyone who came, please leave school grounds immediately." Ikiyo looked around nervously but stop up reluctantly and left school grounds.

On his way back he saw a few people, they had the same goo dripping from they're mouthes looked deathly pale and they're jaws looked more stretched then usual.

ᎵᎯᎵᎵᎽ ᏒᏋ𐒐 𐒀ᏬᎿ 😚
creator: Fuckmegeto
